zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Cramphorne於1562年9月27日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，她的父親William Cramphorne43歲，母親Jane Plowewrighte24歲。她於1584年7月23日與Edmund Browne在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1607年在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年45歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Cramphorne于1562年9月27日出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，她的父亲William Cramphorne43岁，母亲Jane Plowewrighte24岁。她于1584年7月23日与Edmund Browne在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1607年在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年45岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cramphorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English crampe ‘curved’ + horn ‘horn’. Compare Crunkhorn .

variants.name: Crunkhorn
meanings: English: nickname: unexplained. Perhaps a variant of Cramphorn formed with Middle English crunkel(d) ‘wrinkle(d)’ rather than crampe, crumpe ‘curved, bent’. Compare Crankhorn, apparently similarly formed with crank ‘bent, crooked’: Thomas James Crankhorn, 1754 in IGI (Clerkenwell, Middx).

variants.name: Crampin
meanings: 2 English: nickname possibly from Middle English crampoun (Old French crampoun) ‘cramping iron, grappling iron’, possibly for a maker or user of such an implement.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Cramphorne was born on 27 September 1562, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Cramphorne, was 43 and her mother, Jane Plowewrighte, was 24. She married Edmund Browne on 23 July 1584, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1607, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Cramphorne est née le 27 septembre 1562, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Cramphorne, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jane Plowewrighte, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Browne le 23 juillet 1584, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1607, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

September 1562 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cramphorne 43 und ihre Mutter Jane Plowewrighte 24. Sie hat am 23. Juli 1584 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England Edmund Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1607 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Cramphorneが1562年9月27日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父William Cramphorneは43歳，母Jane Plowewrighteは24歳であった。1584年7月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでEdmund Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1607年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで45歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cramphorne(이)가 1562년 9월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cramphorne(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Plowewrighte(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1584년 7월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Edmund Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cramphorne nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1562, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Cramphorne, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jane Plowewrighte, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Browne em 23 de julho de 1584, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1607, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Cramphorne родилась 27 сентября 1562 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Cramphorne было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Plowewrighte, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Browne 23 июля 1584 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1607 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Edmund Browne el 23 de julio de 1584, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas.
